originalTitle: META Valuation Remains Attractive, Says Wolfe
summary: Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) is one of the 12 Stocks Most Bought by Hedge Funds in Q1 2026. On May 21, Wolfe Research reiterated its Outperform rating on Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) with a price target of $800, pointing to an attractive valuation despite worries about the company’s capital expenditure levels. Wolfe Research pointed out […]
content:
Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META ) is one of the 12 Stocks Most Bought by Hedge Funds in Q1 2026 . On May 21, Wolfe Research reiterated its Outperform rating on Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) with a price target of $800, pointing to an attractive valuation despite worries about the company’s capital expenditure levels.

Wolfe Research pointed out that the stock is trading at about 16 times its estimated 2027 earnings. The firm believes Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) is arguably a higher-quality asset than most of the S&P 500, even though its stock trades at a material discount.

The research firm noted that investors are concerned that Meta Platforms, Inc.’s (NASDAQ:META) growth may have peaked. Other worries include limited visibility into the company’s return on invested capital, negative free cash flow, and annual capital expenditures of around $145 billion. Investors are also skeptical about how the company is allocating its capital spending and what near-term catalysts could drive the stock higher.

Despite these concerns, Wolfe Research forecasts 2027 revenue growth of 22% year-over-year compared to Wall Street’s estimate of 19%.

Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) is an American multinational technology company that owns and operates Facebook, Instagram, Threads, Messenger, and WhatsApp.

While we acknowledge the potential of META as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock .

chineseTitle: 沃尔夫表示 META 估值仍然有吸引力
chineseSummary: Meta Platforms, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：META）是 2026 年第一季度对冲基金最常购买的 12 只股票之一。5 月 21 日，Wolfe Research 重申了对 Meta Platforms, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：META）的跑赢大盘评级，目标价为 800 美元，指出尽管对该公司的资本支出水平感到担忧，但估值仍具有吸引力。沃尔夫研究指出[...]
chineseContent:
Meta Platforms, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：META）是 2026 年第一季度对冲基金最常购买的 12 只股票之一。 5 月 21 日，Wolfe Research 重申了对 Meta Platforms, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：META）的跑赢大盘评级，目标价为 800 美元，指出尽管对该公司的资本支出水平感到担忧，但估值仍具有吸引力。

Wolfe Research 指出，该股目前的交易价格约为 2027 年预计市盈率的 16 倍。该公司认为，Meta Platforms, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：META）可以说是比大多数标准普尔 500 指数成分股更高质量的资产，尽管其股票交易价格大幅折扣。

该研究公司指出，投资者担心 Meta Platforms, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：META）的增长可能已见顶。其他担忧包括公司投资资本回报率的可见性有限、负自由现金流以及约 1,450 亿美元的年度资本支出。投资者还对该公司如何分配资本支出以及哪些近期催化剂可能推动股价走高表示怀疑。

尽管存在这些担忧，Wolfe Research 预测 2027 年收入同比增长 22%，而华尔街的预测为 19%。

Meta Platforms, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：META）是一家美国跨国科技公司，拥有并运营 Facebook、Instagram、Threads、Messenger 和 WhatsApp。

虽然我们承认 META 作为一项投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票具有更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。
